mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_PROFILE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_PROFILE SET is_active = 'N' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_PROFILE ( user_id, version_id, status_code_value_id, profile_json_path, input_level, is_active, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{versionId}, #{statusCodeValueId}, #{profileJsonPath}, #{inputLevel}, 'Y', SYSTIMESTAMP )
